## What this changes

A short description of the change.

## Why

The problem this solves or the value it adds.

## How tested

- [ ] `pnpm test:run` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Manually verified in `pnpm dev`

## Privacy + scope check

- [ ] No new network calls added
- [ ] No telemetry or analytics added
- [ ] No account/login system added
- [ ] No insurance-side workflow code added
